languages.text: {n}Себериан издает низкий довольный смешок.{/n} "Не забывайся. Тебе нужно приложить куда больше усилий, чтобы внушить страх в мое сердце".
{n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан издает низкий довольный смешок.{/n} "Не забывайся. Тебе нужно приложить куда больше усилий, чтобы внушить страх в мое сердце".

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to exert considerably more effort to instil fear in my heart."

{n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安发出一声低沉而满足的轻笑。{/n}“别自欺欺人了。想让我心生恐惧，你还得再下些功夫才行。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安发出一声低沉而满足的轻笑。{/n}“别自欺欺人了。想让我心生恐惧，你还得再下些功夫才行。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian suelta una risa grave y satisfecha.{/n} «No se engañe. Tendrá que esforzarse mucho más para atemorizarme».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian suelta una risa grave y satisfecha.{/n} «No se engañe. Tendrá que esforzarse mucho más para atemorizarme».

languages.text: {n}Seberian lâche un petit rire satisfait.{/n} « Ne vous faites pas d'illusion. Vous allez devoir faire bien mieux que cela si vous souhaitez instiller la peur dans mon cœur. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian lâche un petit rire satisfait.{/n} « Ne vous faites pas d'illusion. Vous allez devoir faire bien mieux que cela si vous souhaitez instiller la peur dans mon cœur. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian hafif, memnun bir kıkırdama koyuveriyor.{/n} "Kendini kandırma. Kalbime korku salmak için bundan çok daha fazla çabalaman gerek."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hafif, memnun bir kıkırdama koyuveriyor.{/n} "Kendini kandırma. Kalbime korku salmak için bundan çok daha fazla çabalaman gerek."

languages.text: {n}Seberian stößt ein tiefes, zufriedenes Lachen aus.{/n} "Macht Euch nichts vor. Ihr müsst schon deutlich mehr tun, um Angst in meinem Herzen zu wecken."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian stößt ein tiefes, zufriedenes Lachen aus.{/n} "Macht Euch nichts vor. Ihr müsst schon deutlich mehr tun, um Angst in meinem Herzen zu wecken."

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは満足げに低い笑いを漏らした。{/n}「自分を欺くな。私の心に恐怖を与えるには、もっとはるかに努力しなければならないだろう」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian lets out a low, satisfied chuckle.{/n} "Do not delude yourself. You shall need to work much harder than that to instil fear in my heart."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは満足げに低い笑いを漏らした。{/n}「自分を欺くな。私の心に恐怖を与えるには、もっとはるかに努力しなければならないだろう」
